prestazioni: 4A-GE 20V 'Silver Top' (4A-GELU) engine swap with Tomei 264°/264° camshafts, HKS 272° adjustable cam gears, and a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust featuring a Fujitsubo GSpec AX5000 cat-back system with 76mm dual outlets for optimized scavenging on the 1.6L inline-4

Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.86 A/R turbine housing) paired with a GReddy T78 front-mount intercooler (400x160x65mm core), custom 3-inch aluminum charge piping, and a Tomei Type-S blow-off valve for the 4A-GE's unique throttle body configuration

Ohlins DFV Road & Track coilovers (MR2 AW11-specific valving) with 8kg/mm front and 6kg/mm rear springs, Cusco 22mm front and 19mm rear adjustable sway bars, and SuperPro poly bushings (part #SPF0116) for the rear trailing arms to eliminate compliance
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 AW11 widebody kit with custom carbon fiber overfenders (25mm wider front, 35mm wider rear), extended to clear 17x9.5 +25 ET Volk Racing TE37SL wheels with 225/45R17 front and 245/40R17 rear Yokohama Advan A052 tires

Seibon Carbon AW11-specific hood (part #TOY-011C) with a 3-inch cowl scoop for intercooler ducting, paired with a custom rear diffuser by Varis Japan (MR2-specific design) featuring integrated dual 3-inch exhaust exits

Custom interior with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (MR2 AW11-specific mounts), Takata Drift III 4-point harnesses, and a Momo Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm diameter) on a NRG quick-release hub, with a full Alcantara headliner and door cards by Status Racing
